mapper.select: select orderid, to_char(basedate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as basedate, runcnt, jobid, version, jobname,system, policy_id, keymap_id, jobtype, runtype, calendar, time, status, confirmflag, holdflag, forceokflag, killflag, to_char(eststarttime,'yyyy/mm/dd hh24:mi:ss') as eststarttime, runningtime, to_char(realstarttime,'yyyy/mm/dd hh24:mi:ss') as realstarttime, to_char(realendtime,'yyyy/mm/dd hh24:mi:ss') as realendtime, job_owner_id1, job_owner_name1, job_owner_id2, job_owner_name2, job_owner_id3, job_owner_name3, to_char(orderdate,'yyyy/mm/dd hh24:mi:ss') as orderdate, orderuserid from cotdl.tbl_piiorder order by orderid desc

select orderid, to_char(basedate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as basedate, runcnt, jobid, version, jobname,system, policy_id, keymap_id, jobtype, runtype, calendar, time, status, confirmflag, holdflag, forceokflag, killflag, to_char(eststarttime,'yyyy/mm/dd hh24:mi:ss') as eststarttime, runningtime, to_char(realstarttime,'yyyy/mm/dd hh24:mi:ss') as realstarttime, to_char(realendtime,'yyyy/mm/dd hh24:mi:ss') as realendtime, job_owner_id1, job_owner_name1, job_owner_id2, job_owner_name2, job_owner_id3, job_owner_name3, to_char(orderdate,'yyyy/mm/dd hh24:mi:ss') as orderdate, orderuserid from cotdl.tbl_piiorder where (jobid, basedate) in( select a.jobid, min(a.basedate) from cotdl.tbl_piiorder a where 1=1 and eststarttime <= SYSDATE and status in ('Wait condition', 'Running') and holdflag = 'N' and forceokflag = 'N' and killflag = 'N' and confirmflag = 'N' and not exists(select 1 from cotdl.tbl_piiorder where jobid=a.jobid and status in ('Ended not OK', 'Running', 'Hold') and orderid!=a.orderid) and (select count(distinct jobid_w) from cotdl.tbl_piiorderjobwait b where a.orderid = b.orderid and type='PRE') = (select count(1) from cotdl.tbl_piiorder c where c.jobid in (select jobid_w from cotdl.tbl_piiorderjobwait b where a.orderid = b.orderid and type='PRE') and c.basedate = a.basedate and c.status = 'Ended OK' ) group by a.jobid )

select count(1) from cotdl.tbl_piiorder where (jobid, basedate) in( select a.jobid, min(a.basedate) from cotdl.tbl_piiorder a where 1=1 and eststarttime <= SYSDATE and status in ('Wait condition', 'Running') and holdflag = 'N' and forceokflag = 'N' and killflag = 'N' and confirmflag = 'N' and not exists(select 1 from cotdl.tbl_piiorder where jobid=a.jobid and status in ('Ended not OK', 'Running', 'Hold') and orderid!=a.orderid) and (select count(distinct jobid_w) from cotdl.tbl_piiorderjobwait b where a.orderid = b.orderid and type='PRE') = (select count(1) from cotdl.tbl_piiorder c where c.jobid in (select jobid_w from cotdl.tbl_piiorderjobwait b where a.orderid = b.orderid and type='PRE') and c.basedate = a.basedate and c.status = 'Ended OK' ) group by a.jobid )
select count(1) from cotdl.tbl_piiorder where jobid= #{jobid} and status = 'Recovered' and trunc(basedate) = (to_date(#{basedate, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'yyyy/mm/dd'))
mapper.insert: insert into cotdl.tbl_piiorder (orderid, basedate, runcnt, jobid, version, jobname,system, policy_id, keymap_id, jobtype, runtype, calendar, time, status, confirmflag, holdflag, forceokflag, killflag, eststarttime, runningtime, realstarttime, realendtime, job_owner_id1, job_owner_name1, job_owner_id2, job_owner_name2, job_owner_id3, job_owner_name3, orderdate, orderuserid) values (#{orderid}, to_date(#{basedate, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'yyyy/mm/dd'), #{runcnt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{system, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{policy_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{keymap_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobtype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{runtype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{calendar, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{time, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{confirmflag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{holdflag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{forceokflag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{killflag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, to_date(#{eststarttime, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'yyyy/mm/dd hh24:mi:ss'), null, null, null, #{job_owner_id1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{job_owner_name1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{job_owner_id2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{job_owner_name2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{job_owner_id3, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{job_owner_name3, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{orderuserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into cotdl.tbl_piiorder (orderid, basedate, runcnt, jobid, version, jobname,system, policy_id, keymap_id, jobtype, runtype, calendar, time, status, confirmflag, holdflag, forceokflag, killflag, eststarttime, runningtime, realstarttime, realendtime, job_owner_id1, job_owner_name1, job_owner_id2, job_owner_name2, job_owner_id3, job_owner_name3, orderdate, orderuserid) values (#{orderid}, to_date(#{basedate, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'yyyy/mm/dd'), #{runcnt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{system, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{policy_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{keymap_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobtype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{runtype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{calendar, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{time, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{confirmflag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{holdflag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{forceokflag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{killflag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, to_date(#{eststarttime, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'yyyy/mm/dd hh24:mi:ss'), null, null, null, #{job_owner_id1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{job_owner_name1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{job_owner_id2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{job_owner_name2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{job_owner_id3, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{job_owner_name3, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{orderuserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: select orderid, to_char(basedate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as basedate, runcnt, jobid, version, jobname,system, policy_id, keymap_id, jobtype, runtype, calendar, time, status, confirmflag, holdflag, forceokflag, killflag, to_char(eststarttime,'yyyy/mm/dd hh24:mi:ss') as eststarttime, runningtime, to_char(realstarttime,'yyyy/mm/dd hh24:mi:ss') as realstarttime, to_char(realendtime,'yyyy/mm/dd hh24:mi:ss') as realendtime, job_owner_id1, job_owner_name1, job_owner_id2, job_owner_name2, job_owner_id3, job_owner_name3, to_char(orderdate,'yyyy/mm/dd hh24:mi:ss') as orderdate, orderuserid from cotdl.tbl_piiorder where orderid= (select max(orderid) from cotdl.tbl_piiorder where jobid = #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and jobtype='PII' and status = 'Ended OK')

select sum(case when status='Ended OK' then 1 else 0 end ) as ok ,sum(case when status='Running' then 1 else 0 end ) as run ,sum(case when status='Wait condition' then 1 else 0 end ) as wait ,sum(case when status='Ended not OK' then 1 else 0 end ) as ko ,sum(case when status='Recovered' then 1 else 0 end ) as recovered ,count(1) total from cotdl.tbl_piiorder /*where basedate >= SYSDATE - 7*/
mapper.update:
update cotdl.tbl_piiorder set status= 'Running', realstarttime= COALESCE(realstarttime,SYSDATE), realendtime= null, runningtime= ( TRUNC((sysdate-realstarttime)*24) || ':' || LPAD(TRUNC(mod((sysdate - realstarttime)*24,1)*60),2,'0' ) || ':' || LPAD(TRUNC(round(mod((sysdate - realstarttime)*24*60,1)*60)),2,'0' )
), runcnt = runcnt + 1 where orderid= #{orderid}

update cotdl.tbl_piiorder set status= (select rtrim(case when ok = 0 then 'Ended OK' when notok > 0 then 'Ended not OK' when running > 0 then 'Running' when wait > 0 then 'Running' end) from ( select COALESCE(sum(case when status != 'Ended OK' then 1 end),0) as ok , COALESCE(sum(case when status = 'Ended not OK' then 1 end),0) as notok , COALESCE(sum(case when status = 'Running' then 1 end),0) as running , COALESCE(sum(case when status = 'Wait condition' then 1 end),0) as wait from cotdl.tbl_piiorderstep where orderid= #{orderid} ) ), runningtime= ( TRUNC((sysdate-realstarttime)*24) || ':' || LPAD(TRUNC(mod((sysdate - realstarttime)*24,1)*60),2,'0' ) || ':' || LPAD(TRUNC(round(mod((sysdate - realstarttime)*24*60,1)*60)),2,'0' )
), realendtime= (select case when ok = 0 then SYSDATE when notok > 0 then SYSDATE when running > 0 then null when wait > 0 then null end from ( select COALESCE(sum(case when status != 'Ended OK' then 1 end),0) as ok , COALESCE(sum(case when status = 'Ended not OK' then 1 end),0) as notok , COALESCE(sum(case when status = 'Running' then 1 end),0) as running , COALESCE(sum(case when status = 'Wait condition' then 1 end),0) as wait from cotdl.tbl_piiorderstep where orderid= #{orderid} ) ) where orderid= #{orderid}

update cotdl.tbl_piiorder set runcnt= #{runcnt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status= #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, confirmflag= #{confirmflag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, holdflag= #{holdflag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, forceokflag= #{forceokflag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, killflag= #{killflag, jdbcType=VARCHAR} where orderid= #{orderid}

update cotdl.tbl_piiorder set status= 'Wait condition', confirmflag= 'N', holdflag= 'N', forceokflag= 'N',
eststarttime=SYSDATE, runningtime= null, realstarttime= null, realendtime= null where orderid= #{orderid}
mapper.select: select count(1) from cotdl.tbl_piiorder where upper(jobid) = upper(#{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and version = #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and trunc(basedate) = trunc(to_date(#{basedate, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'yyyy/mm/dd'))

select jobid, max(version) as version, max(jobtype) as jobtype, max(runtype) as runtype, max(system) as system, max(calendar) as calendar, max(time) as time, max(job_owner_name1) as job_owner_name1 , max(policy_id) as policy_id, max(keymap_id) as keymap_id, count(jobid) as runcnt, min(basedate) as basedate_min, max(basedate) as basedate_max , max(realstarttime) as lastexedatetime from cotdl.tbl_piiorder group by jobid order by jobid
